html:
Exclusive to:  

A Log Raft is a craftable Boat introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be found in the Nautical Tab, requires 6 Logs and 4 Cut Grass to craft and is available from the beginning of the game. It begins with 150 durability, which will deplete gradually with use and when damage is taken. It can be repaired with a Boat Repair Kit or the Sea Yard. The Log Raft cannot have attachments.

Tips

  • The Log Raft and the Raft share the same amount of durability, the only difference is that the Raft is faster.


DSTDSRoGSWHam

“About as stable as a wooden balloon.”
–Wheeler
A Log Raft is a craftable Boat introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be found in the Nautical Tab, requires 6 Logs and 4 Cut Grass to craft and is available from the beginning of the game. It begins with 150 durability, which will deplete gradually with use and when damage is taken. It can be repaired with a Boat Repair Kit or the Sea Yard. The Log Raft cannot have attachments.

The Log Raft and the Raft share the same amount of durability, the only difference is that the Raft is faster.

A '''Log Raft''' is a craftable [[Boats|Boat]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It can be found in the [[Nautical Tab]], requires 6 [[Log]]s and 4 [[Cut Grass]] to craft and is available from the beginning of the game. It begins with 150 durability, which will deplete gradually with use and when damage is taken. It can be repaired with a [[Boat Repair Kit]] or the [[Sea Yard]]. The Log Raft cannot have attachments.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* The Log Raft and the [[Raft]] share the same amount of durability, the only difference is that the Raft is faster.
